hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

path="${TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$path" in *.tsx|*.ts|*.css) bash scripts/verify-tokens.sh > /tmp/verify-tokens.log 2>&1 || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"⚠ verify-tokens upozorava na drift — pokreni npm run verify:tokens za detalje."}}' ;; esac
